content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.13%, Auto leading +2.02%, PSU Bank +1.67%, Realty +1.64%, and VIX cooling -3.79%. Earnings season tailwind across financials, pharma, ports. Existing book is performing well (+1.10% intraday unrealized). Focus is on trailing SLs to lock in gains and selective adds in cluster-disciplined manner.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1032.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +6.6% with strong Q4 print (PAT +19.2% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, ROA 2.66%). SL already at 1032 = +4.9% above entry, locks in gain. CMP 1049 - SL 1032 = 1.6% trail gap, healthy. Target 1110 = 5.8% upside intact (R:R favorable). Holding through to target. Stored SL/target unchanged — emitting as confirmation; if no-op, treat as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6% but serves as portfolio hedge against macro risks (FII outflow, crude spike, Mid-East tension). Bullish gold setup per JPM forecasts $5,055/oz Q4. SL 119 gives ~3.3% downside room. Hold for hedge utility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1795.85,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.8% gainer at 52-week high 1833.80. Stored SL 1795.85 = +3.6% above entry, locks substantial profit. Bumping target to 1880 (from 1860) — Organon acquisition transformative, brokerage targets 2030-2320, MACD bullish, breakout structure intact. Q4 results May 19 — will reassess closer; for now ride momentum with breakeven-plus SL secured. SL trail gap = 2.1%, healthy."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.5% at 483.10, near 52-week high 485.70. Trailing SL from 472 → 475 (+1.28% above entry, locks small gain). CMP-SL gap = 1.7%, sufficient. Mixed Q4 (April production -9.7% YoY a concern) but strong dividend Rs 25.50/share and e-auction premium 51% supportive. Target 495 = ~2.5% upside, R:R now ~3:1 from current. Tight trail acceptable given production miss tail risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "new_target": 212.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.2% at 204.43 = 52-week high 204.44. 8.2x volume = institutional accumulation per intent. Trail SL from 200 → 201 (+0.5% above entry, breakeven+). CMP-SL gap = 1.7%, working. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2%, secured book +27%. Bumping target to 212 (from 210) reflects breakout extension. Stock at 52w high — continuation likely."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.5%; SL 296 gives ~0.7% additional downside. Crude at $101+ from Mid-East tension is structural tailwind; Q3 EPS beat +36.6%. Q4 results May 21 — will reassess closer to event. SL is already tight, no further trail justified. Hold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.55,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% at 23.99. SL 23.55 stays (trail gap 1.8%). Bumping target to 25.20 (from 24.95) — pharma sector outperforming, defensive characteristic in current macro, Sun-Organon tailwind for index. Q4 earnings cluster (Cipla May 13, Sun May 19) supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 928.00,
      "new_target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.0% at 946. Trailing SL from 915 → 928 (-1.7% from entry, reduces risk). CMP-SL gap = 1.9%, healthy. Q4 PAT +23%, AUM crossed Rs 5 lakh cr, GNPA 1.01% best-in-class. Brokerage targets 1000-1100. Target 985 unchanged — within reach. R:R still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1700.00,
      "stop_loss": 1655.00,
      "target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh 52-week high (1723 today vs prior 1672). Q4 strong: revenue +27%, EBITDA +20%, PAT +9.4%; first Indian operator to cross 500 MMT cargo; FY27 guidance Rs 43-45K cr revenue. Brokerage consensus Strong Buy, avg target ~1830. Position size: 30 × 1700 = Rs 51,000 = 5.1% of capital. SL 1655 = -2.65%; target 1790 = +5.3%; R:R = 2.0:1. Risk budget: 5.1% × 2.65% = 0.135% of portfolio (well within 0.5%). Adani group governance overhang noted but APSEZ specifically cleared in Sept 2025; cleanest entity in group. Sector cluster: no other ports/logistics in book."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results announced TODAY — binary event risk per Rule 11. Street expecting modest miss (Rs 2.55 bn PAT vs est 2.8 bn). Will not enter pre-results. Re-evaluate post-print."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary event. Q3 was a loss; soda ash structurally oversupplied; Mithapur expansion adds capacity into glut. Pre-result 9% rally suggests speculative positioning. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MANAPPURAM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results + earnings call TODAY 5 PM. SEBI Administrative Warning to CMD — governance optic flag per Rule 13. Avoid entry pre-event with active governance overhang. Re-evaluate post-print."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "FLUOROCHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.3% gap-up parabolic; P/E ~60x flagged 'over-valued'. Q4 results May 13 — binary in 9 days. Chasing a single-day 10% move into earnings is poor risk-reward."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Previously exited on Day 3 with explicit binary-event reasoning. Re-entry would need fresh post-exit catalyst beyond price action. Power sector strength alone insufficient. Skip per Rule 14."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KOTAKBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.41% today despite Banking +1.01% — relative weakness post Q4. NII growth (8%) trailing advances (16%) signals NIM compression. Already have BANDHANBNK + PNBHOUSING in financials cluster. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "IT sector lagging structurally. No conviction setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary event. Already +4.22% pre-result. Skip per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.55% gap to 10,455 — chasing a parabolic auto move at 52-week high is poor R:R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Auto leader +5.15%. Wait for pullback to support per original watchlist thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AMBUJACEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results today — binary event. Skip per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SYNGENE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.89% gap-up. Already have pharma exposure via SUNPHARMA + PHARMABEES. Pass on single-day catalyst chase."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have diversified single-stock book. Adding index ETF would over-correlate without alpha."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1032 already locks +4.9% gain; trail gap 1.6% adequate. Let target 1110 work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; underperforming but macro thesis (geopolitical, central bank buying) intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1795.85,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1795.85 = breakeven-plus +3.6%; target raised to 1880. Q4 May 19 — will tighten further closer to event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 475.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail 472 → 475 to lock additional gain; CMP-SL gap 1.7% gives breathing room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to breakeven+ at 201; momentum strong, want to ride continuation toward 212."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 296 already tight (-2% from entry). Crude tailwind structural. Q4 May 21."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.55 unchanged; target lifted to 25.20 to reflect pharma sector outperformance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 928.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail 915 → 928 to reduce drawdown risk while keeping 1.9% breathing room from CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Post-results today: EXIDEIND, TATACHEM, MANAPPURAM, BHEL, AMBUJACEM — re-evaluate after print and price reaction tomorrow. MARUTI on pullback to support could be entry candidate. FLUOROCHEM Q4 May 13 — wait. SUNPHARMA Q4 May 19, ONGC Q4 May 21 — will tighten existing SLs closer to events.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book performing well: deployed 42%, unrealized +1.10% on the day, six of eight positions in profit. Cluster check: Financials = PNBHOUSING (8%) + BANDHANBNK (5%) + BAJFINANCE (5%) = 18% of capital — at the cluster watch threshold; will not add more financials today. Energy/Commodity = COALINDIA (5%) + ONGC (5%) = 10%. Pharma = SUNPHARMA (5%) + PHARMABEES (3.5%) = 8.5%. Adding ADANIPORTS (5%) opens Services/Infra cluster cleanly. GESHIP pending order (Rs 1542) still OPEN — leaving alone, original thesis intact. Cumulative experiment P&L still slightly negative (-Rs 2,566) but trajectory inflecting positive with current unrealized +Rs 11,044. Discipline focus: trail SLs aggressively on winners as Q4 binary events approach for held names."
}
